headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for March 7, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending March 7, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 10,000 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).
